title: uragoga fluminensis
side_effects: Uragoga fluminensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. Improper use of this plant may also cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its high saponin content. Additionally, excessive consumption of uragoga fluminensis may lead to cardiovascular issues, including high blood pressure and irregular heartbeats. Furthermore, its improper use may also cause kidney damage due to its toxic properties, making it essential to use it under medical supervision.
